summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Hungarian CRM Phase 2 location-based worker filtering features. All major functionality working correctly including new UI filters, geocoding integration, and label updates.

minor_issues.issue: Geocoding during worker creation returns null coordinates for specific addresses that don't exist in OpenStreetMap
minor_issues.impact: Workers created with non-existent addresses won't have coordinates, but this is expected behavior

passed_tests: Counties endpoint returns 20 Hungarian counties including Budapest and Pest
Geocoding endpoint successfully geocodes addresses (tested with Budapest)
Location-based worker filtering (county, position, location search with radius)
Workers page navigation and UI elements loading
Location search with radius slider functionality
'Lakóhely' label correctly displayed on WorkerFormPage (renamed from 'Lakcím')
Complete worker creation workflow including geocoding
Worker detail page navigation and display
All Phase 2 UI components present and functional
